creator: brix@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

On Nov 16, 2010, at 21:15, Thierry Thomas wrote:
> Please let me know when you'll consider this PR as OK, in order to
> synchronize it with PR ports/152191.

Actually, we are in the middle of a repocopy (which went terribly wrong in the first coordination attempt), see ports/151093.

The plan is to keep both the 1.0.x and the 1.2.x series in FreeBSD Ports.

Brix
-- 
Henrik Brix Andersen <brix@FreeBSD.org>
